review_summary: Theme change re-renders user consumers. Value not memoized.

issues_found.title: Theme change re-renders user consumers
issues_found.explanation: Anyone using useContext(AppContext) re-renders on theme change, even if only using user.

issues_found.title: New each render
issues_found.explanation: All consumers re-render every parent render.

issues_that_arent_issues: Combined data structure OK if memoized.
broader_pattern: Split contexts by update frequency.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Context split for re-render isolation; memoizing values.

review_summary: No cleanup. Component unmounts during animation = stale closures, setState on unmounted. Plus loop continues after unmount.

issues_found.title: rAF continues after unmount
issues_found.explanation: Component unmounts during count up. rAF still scheduled. setState fires on unmounted.
issues_found.fix: Track frame ID, cancel on unmount

issues_found.title: Wrong rAF pattern
issues_found.explanation: rAF should be the loop driver, not nested in setState.

broader_pattern: Animation loops need cancellation.
what_makes_this_review_senior: rAF cancellation; loop structure outside setState.

review_summary: Double-click submits twice. No loading state. No error display.

issues_found.title: Double-submit
issues_found.explanation: Click twice rapidly = two login attempts.

issues_found.title: Failed login silent
issues_found.explanation: Wrong password = nothing happens to user.

issues_found.title: JSON without header
issues_found.explanation: Server may misparse.

issues_found.title: Password in plain JSON
issues_found.explanation: Only safe over HTTPS. Verify HTTPS in production.

broader_pattern: Auth needs pending/error/HTTPS.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Full login flow checklist: pending, error, autocomplete, labels.

review_summary: name typed string but ?. returns undefined if null. Type lies.

issues_found.title: undefined assigned to string
issues_found.explanation: user?.profile?.name returns string | undefined. Annotated string. TS allows but it's not actually string at runtime.

broader_pattern: Optional chaining produces union with undefined. Type accordingly.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Optional chain returns union with undefined; nullish coalescing for default.

review_summary: Missing alt attribute. Required for accessibility.

issues_found.title: Missing alt
issues_found.explanation: SR reads 'image' but no description.

issues_found.title: CLS risk
issues_found.explanation: Image loads without reserved space, causes layout shift.

issues_found.title: Eager load
issues_found.explanation: Below-fold images load eagerly.

broader_pattern: Images need: alt, dimensions, lazy.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Image checklist: alt, dimensions, lazy, decoding.

review_summary: setUser passed deep = parent re-renders on every keystroke.

issues_found.title: Parent re-renders on child input
issues_found.explanation: Each keystroke in child = setUser in parent = parent + siblings re-render.
issues_found.fix: State in EditForm, submit to parent

issues_found.title: Spread loses methods
issues_found.explanation: If User class, spread loses prototype.

broader_pattern: Lift state to lowest common needs; don't pass setters through to leaf.
what_makes_this_review_senior: State location matters for re-render scope; local draft + submit pattern.

review_summary: State per step lost on navigate. User goes back, loses input.

issues_found.title: State lost on back
issues_found.explanation: step=1 unmounts when going to 0. step=1's local state (form values) lost.

broader_pattern: Wizard form state should live above the steps.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Wizard state lifting; FormProvider for cross-step persistence.

review_summary: Spring smooths scroll = laggy parallax. Scroll should be 1:1 (or fast multiplier).

issues_found.title: Spring lags scroll
issues_found.explanation: Spring physics smooth-tracks scroll. User scrolls fast, parallax catches up = laggy.

broader_pattern: Springs for natural physics; linear transform for scroll-tracking.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Spring vs transform; physics fit for purpose.

review_summary: `import * as Icons` includes all icons. lucide-react has 1000+. Bundle hit.

issues_found.title: All icons
issues_found.explanation: Star import bypasses tree-shaking for many bundlers.

broader_pattern: Star imports break tree-shake.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Named imports for tree-shaking.

review_summary: componentDidCatch missing getDerivedStateFromError. Plus error.message comparison is fragile.

issues_found.title: State not set from getDerivedStateFromError
issues_found.explanation: componentDidCatch is for side effects. getDerivedStateFromError sets state. Without it, the render doesn't reflect error.

issues_found.title: String comparison fragile
issues_found.explanation: Message change breaks check. Use custom error class.

broader_pattern: ErrorBoundary needs getDerivedStateFromError + componentDidCatch.
what_makes_this_review_senior: ErrorBoundary lifecycle (getDerivedStateFromError + componentDidCatch); typed errors.

review_summary: Two effects sync each other = infinite loop or rapid back-and-forth.

issues_found.title: Effect ping-pong
issues_found.explanation: search change → setSearchParams → searchParams change → setSearch → search change... loop.
issues_found.verification: Type a letter, watch render count

broader_pattern: Single source of truth - URL or state, not both.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Bidirectional sync = bug; nuqs as the canonical URL state library.

review_summary: Logic in render. Extract to pure function. Hard to test.

issues_found.title: Mixing logic and render
issues_found.explanation: Permission → role logic is independent of UI. Should be testable function.

broader_pattern: Pure logic out of render. Easier to test.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Pure logic extraction; testability.

review_summary: videoId from user input could inject malicious URL parameters.

issues_found.title: URL injection
issues_found.explanation: videoId 'abc?param=evil' becomes /embed/abc?param=evil. Could be benign URL params or path traversal.

issues_found.title: iframe full powers
issues_found.explanation: Even YouTube iframe should be sandboxed.

issues_found.title: a11y
issues_found.explanation: iframe needs title for SR.

broader_pattern: User-provided IDs need validation. iframes need sandbox.
what_makes_this_review_senior: User-data validation; youtube-nocookie for privacy; sandbox attributes.

review_summary: UA detection during render = hydration mismatch in SSR.

issues_found.title: Hydration mismatch
issues_found.explanation: Server: no navigator. Client: has. Mismatch.

issues_found.title: Unreliable
issues_found.explanation: UA strings are spoofable, change frequently. Bad detection.
issues_found.fix: Feature detection or CSS media query

broader_pattern: CSS media queries > UA detection for responsive UI.
what_makes_this_review_senior: CSS > JS for responsive; UA detection is anti-pattern.

review_summary: REACT_APP_ prefix is CRA. With Vite, must be VITE_. Plus runtime fallback in prod is dangerous.

issues_found.title: Wrong prefix for Vite
issues_found.explanation: Vite requires VITE_ prefix. Undefined falls back to localhost in production = broken.

issues_found.title: Fallback in prod
issues_found.explanation: If env var missing, ships with localhost. Production users fail.

broader_pattern: Build-time env: prefix matters; no silent fallback for required configs.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Vite vs CRA env; fail-loud on missing required config.

review_summary: Spread creates new object each render. useMemo recomputes every time.

issues_found.title: New object each render
issues_found.explanation: useMemo compares by reference. Spread creates new = useMemo cache always invalid.
issues_found.fix: Use filters directly (if stable) or specific fields

broader_pattern: useMemo deps must be primitive or stable reference.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Inline object in deps defeats useMemo.

review_summary: No cleanup = setInterval leaks forever. Plus SSR mismatch (new Date in render).

issues_found.title: Leak
issues_found.explanation: Component unmount = interval keeps running. setState on unmounted.

issues_found.title: SSR mismatch
issues_found.explanation: Server time != client time.

issues_found.title: Locale mismatch SSR
issues_found.explanation: Format varies.

broader_pattern: Cleanup; SSR-safe initial.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Interval cleanup + SSR-safe initial state.

review_summary: One failure rejects all. Plus no status check.

issues_found.title: All-or-nothing
issues_found.explanation: If posts fails, user and settings discarded.

issues_found.title: 4xx/5xx parsed as JSON
issues_found.explanation: Failed responses still json'd. May return error object as data.

broader_pattern: Promise.allSettled when partial failure acceptable; r.ok check.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Promise.allSettled for partial failure; fetchJSON helper for status check.

code_under_review:
const raw = localStorage.getItem('user');
const user = JSON.parse(raw ?? '{}') as User;
review_summary: as User lies. raw could be 'null', '[]', 'invalid', '{wrong_shape}'.

issues_found.title: Cast doesn't validate
issues_found.explanation: User type expected, but JSON could be anything. No runtime check.

broader_pattern: Trust no input. Validate at boundary.
what_makes_this_review_senior: localStorage is untrusted input; Zod parse + fallback.

submitter_context: PR: 'Disabled nav link when not allowed.'
review_summary: <a> without href is not focusable. SR doesn't announce as link. Plus aria-disabled missing.

issues_found.title: Not focusable
issues_found.explanation: <a> without href isn't a link semantically. Tab skips.
issues_found.fix: <a aria-disabled='true'> with href OR <span> styled like link

issues_found.title: SR doesn't know
issues_found.explanation: Just looks disabled, no announcement.

broader_pattern: Disabled links: keep focusable, add aria-disabled, prevent navigation.
what_makes_this_review_senior: <a> without href is anti-pattern; aria-disabled + preventDefault.

review_summary: Calling total() in selector creates new value each call. Re-renders every render.

issues_found.title: Returns new number reference each time
issues_found.explanation: Even though number is same, the selector returns from function call each render. Zustand sees new value vs cached, triggers re-render.
issues_found.fix: Computed via selector function or external

issues_found.title: Actions use get()
issues_found.explanation: set has access to previous state via callback. get() is fine but callback form preferred.

broader_pattern: Derived values in stores: use selectors, not methods.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Derived in selector vs method; stable selectors.

review_summary: Not inside <form>. No accessible label. Composition events (IME) trigger submission.

issues_found.title: Browser doesn't recognize
issues_found.explanation: <form action='...'> works without JS. Native search experience.

issues_found.title: IME compose triggers search
issues_found.explanation: Japanese/Chinese input: Enter confirms char. Should not search.

issues_found.title: a11y
issues_found.explanation: SR doesn't know what input is for.

broader_pattern: Forms with native semantics; IME consideration.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Form semantics; IME composition; native Enter handling.

review_summary: For 100+ items, 100 animation engines running. Plus all re-render on items change.

issues_found.title: Many JS animations
issues_found.explanation: 100 motion.div = 100 spring engines.
issues_found.fix: CSS where possible; only animate visible

issues_found.title: Layout-triggering on every hover
issues_found.explanation: scale OK (compositor), but mass hovers...

broader_pattern: Mass animations: CSS where possible, JS only for complex.
what_makes_this_review_senior: CSS for mass animations; cap stagger; transform: scale is compositor.

review_summary: useTrace and faker imported eagerly. Even with conditional usage, code is included.

issues_found.title: 4MB faker in prod
issues_found.explanation: Import statement includes faker in bundle regardless of usage.

issues_found.title: Dev tool in prod
issues_found.explanation: @org/debug-tools shouldn't ship to prod.

broader_pattern: Dev-only code: dynamic import gated by env check.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Static imports include in bundle; dynamic + env gate for dev-only.

review_summary: If build strips console, prod errors lost. Plus only Sentry in prod = no dev visibility.

issues_found.title: Stripped console = lost prod errors
issues_found.explanation: Build often strips console.* in prod. console.error before Sentry call could be stripped.

issues_found.title: Dev errors not visible in Sentry
issues_found.explanation: Dev errors don't go to staging Sentry; harder to test integration.

broader_pattern: Error reporting order; build-time stripping awareness.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Build-time stripping nuance; Sentry ordering; pure vs drop.
